questions.question: What body of water provides the 'black peloid' mud favored by mud bath connoisseurs in Israel?
What's the longest continuously running comic strip in the U.S., dating back to 1897?
What fellow fascist did Adolf Hitler refer to as the 'Little Sausage'?
What animal's flesh, when sun-dried in the Andes, becomes a jerky called charqui?
What former New York Met was nicknamed for the way he pronounced 'milk' as a small child?
What two items of clothing did designers combine to create a 'skort'?
